code:
import io
import string
import list

fn try_add(_ acc: List<Int>, _ buf: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(buf)
    acc
  else
    match string.parse_int(buf)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(acc, v)
        acc
      else
        list.push(acc, v)
      end
    when None
      acc
    end
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut buf = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if is_ws(c)
      nums = try_add(nums, buf)
      buf = ""
    else
      buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
nums = try_add(nums, buf)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  mut new_list: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted and x < y
      new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    new_list = list.push(new_list, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
  end
  sorted = new_list
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
